notes: Font ids correspond to ItemList[i].font and ItemPatchList[i].patch.font.
type=1 means TTF (vector outlines); type=0 means image / bitmap font.
An image font with `charset:"0123456789"` only renders those literal characters; anything else is invisible.
TTF entries with empty `charset` rely on the embedded glyph coverage of the font file. CJK strings only render correctly when the chosen TTF is CJK-capable.
On the device, the file written for font id N is `(N+1).BIN` — keep this in mind when uploading custom fonts.
Use `Device/GetLocalFontList` (watchface_get_fonts_local) to confirm which font ids are actually installed on the target device before referencing them in ItemList.

time_digits.label: Hour/min/sec digits
time_digits.description: Pure numeric time slots (sec/min/hour/HH:MM/HH:MM:SS, world clock, love clock, hour/min decade/unit).

date_digits.label: Date numeric
date_digits.description: Year/month/day numeric slots and combinations (year, mon, day, year-mon-day).

temperature_digits.label: Temperature numeric
temperature_digits.description: Temperature numeric variants and humidity/noise digits.

forecast_digits.label: Forecast min/max digits
forecast_digits.description: Tomorrow / day+2 / day+3 / day+4 min/max digits.

weekday_short.label: Weekday short / English
weekday_short.description: Two-letter, three-letter, full English weekday and tomorrow weekday short.

weekday_zh.label: Weekday Chinese
weekday_zh.description: Chinese weekday strings (e.g., 周一 / 星期一).

month_abbr_en.label: Month abbreviation (English)
month_abbr_en.description: English month abbreviations (Jan / Feb …) and full English month.

weather_text.label: Weather word
weather_text.description: Free-form weather word and forecast weather word slots.

user_text.label: User / app text
user_text.description: Multi-language free text inputs: user message, multi-text message, network text, user text.

pixel_theme_dial.label: Pixel-art themed dials
pixel_theme_dial.description: Time/date inside pixel-art watchfaces; match the pixel aesthetic to avoid jaggy mismatch.

retro_digital_clock.label: Retro digital clock
retro_digital_clock.description: DS-Digital / Audiowide style digital clock dials (LED look).

decorative_title.label: Decorative title
decorative_title.description: App / message titles where artistic flair is desired (handwriting / display / brush).

emoji_glyphs.label: Emoji glyphs
emoji_glyphs.description: Slots whose text intentionally contains emoji codepoints.
